prompt:
Square fantasy RPG job/class emblem icon in the style of a dark AAA action-RPG portrait-emblem (Diablo / Path of Exile / Lost Ark class icon). Low-key painterly digital painting, dramatic chiaroscuro. The subject FILLS THE ENTIRE SQUARE FRAME edge to edge, emerging from a solid deep near-black background with a subtle dark radial vignette in the corners. A grim ember-and-violet glow.

Subject: a haunted, gaunt 13th-century medieval baker — a broken man consumed by grief and vengeance. Ash-smudged weathered face, hollow burning eyes, flour and soot in his stubble, a scorched leather apron, gripping a blighted loaf in one fist. Behind and around him, the embers of his burned-out bakery and a faint haze of purple ergot rot. He seeks revenge, not salvation. Portrait bust composition, three-quarter view, emerging from shadow.

Muted palette of ash-black, soot-grey, wheat-gold, ember-orange, and a haunting rot-violet glow. High detail, rich brushwork, strong dramatic rim light on the face, cinematic, sorrowful and vengeful. NO text, NO border or ornate frame, NO UI chrome, NO empty margins — the art bleeds to all four edges of the square.
